title: Algerian Man Extradited to US for Running Cybercrime Marketplaces
desc:

title: FFmpeg PixelSmash Flaw Allows RCE on Video Players, Media Servers, NAS Appliances
desc:
Attackers can send crafted media files to execute code in any application that uses FFmpeg’s libavcodec library.

title: Decades-Old Squid Proxy Flaw ‘Squidbleed’ Can Expose User Data
